speaker: speaker1
text: Good morning . what can I do for you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I'm looking for some earrings for my wife as a wedding anniversary gift .

speaker: speaker1
text: You've come to the right store . We've got a beautiful and wide selection of earrings for you to choose from .

speaker: speaker2
text: I saw a pair of earrings outside your window . Can you show them to me ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Do you mean the exquisite pearl earrings ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Exactly . How much do you want for them ?

speaker: speaker2
text: What is this setting made of ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , it's specially made of a platinum alloy , sir , and the lustre will never fade out .

speaker: speaker2
text: I'II take them . Please wrap them up tor me and give me the receipt .

speaker: speaker1
text: You've made an excellent choice , sir .
